_comment: Configuration for tcort/markdown-link-check used by the check-links workflow. Tweak ignorePatterns and aliveStatusCodes if a real link is being incorrectly flagged.

replacementPatterns._comment: Rewrite root-relative links like /CHANGELOG.md to their GitHub URL so the checker can verify them. Without this, markdown-link-check tries to HTTP-fetch '/CHANGELOG.md' literally and gets a 400.
